name: rss-feed-monitor
description: Read public RSS/Atom feeds and normalize posts into monitoring rows for sales and marketing intelligence.
business_value: No-key competitor, customer, and industry content monitoring.

auth.note: Uses public RSS or Atom feed URLs.

verification_result: Live smoke checked YC blog RSS and received feed items without an API key.
known_risks: Some feeds include only partial content.
Feed terms and crawl policies still apply.
